2604.14907.title: Comparison of Modern Multilingual Text Embedding Techniques for Hate Speech Detection Task
2604.14907.paper_summary: Online hate speech and abusive language pose a growing challenge for content moderation, especially in multilingual settings and for low-resource languages such as Lithuanian. This paper investigates to what extent modern multilingual sentence embedding models can support accurate hate speech detection in Lithuanian, Russian, and English, and how their performance depends on downstream modeling choices and feature dimensionality. We introduce LtHate, a new Lithuanian hate speech corpus derived from news portals and social networks, and benchmark six modern multilingual encoders (potion, gemma, bge, snow, jina, e5) on LtHate, RuToxic, and EnSuperset using a unified Python pipeline. For each embedding, we train both a one class HBOS anomaly detector and a two class CatBoost classifier, with and without principal component analysis (PCA) compression to 64-dimensional feature vectors. Across all datasets, two class supervised models consistently and substantially outperform one class anomaly detection, with the best configurations achieving up to 80.96% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.887 in Lithuanian (jina), 92.19% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.978 in Russian (e5), and 77.21% accuracy and AUC ROC of 0.859 in English (e5 with PCA). PCA compression preserves almost all discriminative power in the supervised setting, while showing some negative impact for the unsupervised anomaly detection case. These results demonstrate how modern multilingual sentence embeddings combined with gradient boosted decision trees provide robust soft-computing solutions for multilingual hate speech detection applications.
2604.14907.paper_summary_zh: 線上仇恨言論和辱罵語言對內容審核構成了日益增長的挑戰，特別是在多語言環境和資源匱乏的語言（如立陶宛語）中。本文探討了現代多語言句子嵌入模型在立陶宛語、俄語和英語中的仇恨言論檢測的準確性支持程度，以及它們的性能如何依賴於下游建模選擇和特徵維度。我們介紹了LtHate，一個新的立陶宛語仇恨言論語料庫，來源於新聞門戶和社交網絡，並在LtHate、RuToxic和EnSuperset上使用統一的Python管道對六個現代多語言編碼器（potion、gemma、bge、snow、jina、e5）進行基準測試。對於每個嵌入，我們訓練了一個一類HBOS異常檢測器和一個兩類CatBoost分類器，並在有和沒有主成分分析（PCA）壓縮至64維特徵向量的情況下進行訓練。在所有數據集中，兩類監督模型始終顯著超越一類異常檢測，最佳配置在立陶宛語（jina）中達到80.96%的準確率和0.887的AUC ROC，在俄語（e5）中達到92.19%的準確率和0.978的AUC ROC，以及在英語（e5與PCA）中達到77.21%的準確率和0.859的AUC ROC。PCA壓縮在監督環境中幾乎保留了所有的區分能力，而在無監督異常檢測情況下則顯示出一些負面影響。這些結果展示了現代多語言句子嵌入與梯度提升決策樹相結合如何為多語言仇恨言論檢測應用提供穩健的軟計算解決方案。
2604.14907.author: Evaldas Vaiciukynas et.al.
2604.14907.authors: Evaldas Vaiciukynas, Paulius Danenas, Linas Ablonskis, Algirdas Sukys, Edgaras Dambrauskas, Voldemaras Zitkus, Rita Butkiene, Rimantas Butleris
